title: aceratium calomala
intro: Aceratium calomala, also known as the Wild Strawberry Tree, is a plant species in the family Sapotaceae that is native to tropical Africa. Its bark and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aceratium calomala include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the bark and leaves in hot water to create a tea or by extracting the active compounds to create a tincture or capsule.
